zh.title: 雪崩币/美元技术分析：短线震荡偏强，存在进一步上攻动能
zh.content:
AVAX/USD最新报价9.4824，24小时涨幅2.12%，价格逼近日内高点9.4846，显示短线买盘力量有所增强。目前行情运行于SMA20均线9.1011上方，说明阶段性趋势已由弱转稳，多头开始占据主动。

从技术指标观察，MACD数值为0.0068，处于零轴附近并维持正值，反映市场仍存在温和上行动能。虽然RSI暂时缺失，无法确认是否进入超买区域，但价格连续抬升配合均线支撑，整体结构偏向积极。

关键支撑区域位于9.27附近，该位置对应日内低点与短线防守区，若失守可能回踩9.10均线支撑。上方阻力首先关注9.50整数关口，若有效突破，后续有机会进一步测试9.70至9.85区间压力。

操作层面，短线交易者可关注9.27至9.35区域的回踩低吸机会，并以9.10下方作为风控参考。若价格放量突破9.50，适合顺势跟进；但在未形成持续放量前，仍需警惕高位震荡与快速回调风险。

en.title: Avalanche vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Avalanche is showing a constructive short-term recovery as AVAX/USD trades near 9.48 after gaining more than 2% over the last 24 hours. Price action remains firmly above the 20-period simple moving average at 9.10, indicating bullish momentum is gradually strengthening. The session high near 9.48 also suggests buyers are willing to push toward breakout territory after defending the 9.27 intraday low. As long as price holds above the moving average, market sentiment should remain cautiously positive.

Momentum indicators reinforce the improving outlook, although confirmation remains limited. The MACD reading has crossed into positive territory at 0.0068, typically interpreted as an early bullish signal that buying pressure is increasing. However, the absence of a signal line and RSI data means traders should avoid assuming an overextended rally. Instead, the market currently appears to be transitioning from consolidation into a mild upward trend, with volatility still relatively contained compared with previous AVAX movements.

From a technical perspective, immediate support is developing around 9.30, while stronger structural support sits closer to the SMA zone near 9.10. A breakdown below these levels could expose AVAX to renewed selling pressure toward the psychological 9.00 area. On the upside, resistance is forming around 9.50, followed by a broader ceiling near 9.75 if bullish momentum accelerates. A decisive move above resistance could trigger additional short-covering and attract momentum traders into the market.

Short-term traders may consider bullish positions on pullbacks toward the 9.30–9.15 region, especially if volume remains stable and price continues respecting the moving average. Conservative participants may prefer waiting for confirmation above 9.50 before entering breakout trades. Risk management remains important because the broader cryptocurrency environment continues to experience uneven liquidity and sentiment shifts. Tight stop-loss placement below 9.10 may help reduce downside exposure while preserving upside participation if the recovery extends further.
